title: Adobe Firefly Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for everyday Adobe Firefly image generation tasks.

commands.command: Generate a landscape image of a sunset
commands.scenario: When you need a beautiful sunset image for a project.

commands.command: Create an abstract art piece with blue and green tones
commands.description: Produces an abstract art image using specified colors.
commands.scenario: When designing a modern art piece for a presentation.

commands.command: Transform this photo into a watercolor painting
commands.description: Converts a photo into a watercolor-style image.
commands.scenario: When you want to give a photo an artistic touch.

commands.command: Add a vintage filter to this image
commands.description: Applies a vintage filter to an image.
commands.scenario: When you want to give a photo a retro look.

commands.command: Generate a logo with a minimalist style
commands.scenario: When you need a simple and clean logo design.

commands.command: Make this image black and white
commands.description: Converts an image to black and white.
commands.scenario: When you want to remove color for a classic look.

commands.command: Create a collage with these photos
commands.description: Generates a collage from multiple photos.
commands.scenario: When you want to combine several images into one.

commands.command: Enhance the brightness and contrast of this image
commands.description: Improves the brightness and contrast of an image.
commands.scenario: When an image looks dull and needs more vibrancy.

commands.description: Creates an illustration of a fantasy creature.
commands.scenario: When you need an imaginative creature for a story.

commands.command: Add text overlay to this image
commands.scenario: When you want to add a caption or title to an image.

commands.command: Create a pattern with floral designs
commands.description: Generates a pattern using floral designs.

commands.command: Remove the background from this image
commands.description: Deletes the background of an image, leaving the subject.
commands.scenario: When you need a transparent background for a product image.

commands.command: Generate a 3D model of a chair
commands.description: Creates a 3D model of a chair.
commands.scenario: When you need a 3D representation for a furniture design.

commands.command: Apply 'Generative Fill' to replace a specific object in a photo
commands.description: Use the brush tool to select an area and type a prompt to swap objects (e.g., 'change shirt to red leather jacket').
Upload a sketch or photo to use as a structural template so the AI follows your specific layout.
Upload an existing image to force the AI to mimic its specific color palette, lighting, and aesthetic texture.
Type a word and use prompts like 'melting chocolate' or 'fluffy clouds' to turn typography into a 3D textured object.
Use the crop tool to pull edges outward and let Firefly fill in the missing scenery to change aspect ratios.
